name: helm-marketplace
description: Local marketplace for the Helm Claude Code lifecycle plugin suite.

plugins.name: helm-core
plugins.description: Helm core runtime: router, hooks, state machine, doctor, and suite governance.

plugins.name: helm-requirements
plugins.description: Helm requirements stage: foundation specs, requirements questioning, acceptance, and maps.

plugins.name: helm-prototype
plugins.description: Helm prototype stage: isolated prototype code, review, verification, and handoff.

plugins.name: helm-development
plugins.description: Helm development stage: scope lock, vertical slices, task ledger, and development handoff.

plugins.name: helm-verification
plugins.description: Helm verification stage: six-domain evidence, traceability, receipt, and aggregate report.

plugins.name: helm-operations
plugins.description: Helm operations stage: release, install/update policy, deploy, rollback, monitor, and archive.
